content:
Microsoft has released the Agent Governance Toolkit, an open source runtime security system for managing and controlling AI agents.

TLDR  
- Open source toolkit for governing autonomous AI agents  
- Addresses all OWASP Top 10 risks for agentic AI  
- Works across popular frameworks like LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI  
- Introduces Agent OS as a policy engine for real time control  
- Includes identity, trust scoring and secure agent communication  
- Built in runtime controls like execution rings and kill switch  
- Adds SRE practices like circuit breakers and error budgets  
- Supports compliance with EU AI Act, HIPAA and SOC2    
- Designed to be modular, extensible and framework agnostic
